Data.Label: Organization type
Values: Reincarnated Sith Empire (in secret, until 4 ABY)

Data.Label: De facto leader
Values: Galactic Emperor Sheev Palpatine (19 BBY–4 ABY)
Grand Vizier Mas Amedda (4 ABY–5 ABY, proxy Emperor)
Grand Admiral Rae Sloane (5 ABY, public figurehead)
Counselor to the Empire Gallius Rax (5 ABY, Emperor in effect)

Data.Label: Legislative branch
Values: Imperial Senate (19 BBY–0 BBY, disbanded by the Emperor)

Data.Label: Date reorganized
Values: 5 ABY, into a provisional government on Coruscant and numerous independent nations, star systems, and factions
